ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-28-2025 Continued To Jun-25-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Nancy Lofdahl for William McClure, Executor (via Zoom).

Ms. Lofdahl reported that the petition for final distribution had not yet been filed but was in preparation. She stated that she was finalizing the petition, collecting waivers, and securing releases for two minor creditor claims.

Following discussion, the Court continued the matter to June 25, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Off Calendar Feb-18-2025 Continued To Mar-18-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-07-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Feb-15-2022, and two codicils dated Sep-27-2022, are admitted to probate. Wiliam J. McClure is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $589,000.00. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Feb-18-2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
